findings.evidence: `Complex.lean:36-38`: docstring says free module; declaration is `abbrev GridChain (R : Type*) [Zero R] (n : ℕ) := GridState n →₀ R`.
findings.fix: Either strengthen the declaration/doc context to the intended algebraic assumptions, or reword the docstring to say it is the finitely supported coefficient functions on grid states, which become the free module when `R` has the needed module structure.
findings.issue: `GridChain` is documented as “The free module ... over coefficients `R`”, but the declaration only assumes `[Zero R]`, so for arbitrary `R` it is just `GridState n →₀ R`, not necessarily a module.

summary: The new substantive file and differential declarations are documented, but one public abbrev docstring overstates the algebraic structure exposed by its signature.
